title: Support migration of legacy C-LARA projects into importable C-LARA-2 bundles
notes: Suggestion #2 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-03). Add an end-to-end migration path from legacy C-LARA projects to C-LARA-2 import zipfiles. Proposed split: (1) minimal legacy C-LARA export that emits a C-LARA-2-oriented bundle with hierarchical JSON (text/pages/segments/content elements), ideally reusing the pre-HTML internal representation; (2) C-LARA-2 conversion tooling that transforms that bundle into a standard project zip accepted by current import flows. Include format/version metadata, deterministic validation, and clear diagnostics for unsupported legacy fields.
